inputs.label: Voltage
inputs.businessContext: Arc voltage during welding, measured at the power source terminals. Affects total energy input.

inputs.label: Current
inputs.businessContext: Welding current, typically measured with a clamp meter. Higher current increases heat input.

inputs.label: Travel Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the welding torch along the joint. Faster speeds reduce heat input per unit length.

inputs.label: Arc Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Thermal efficiency factor of the welding process (e.g., 0.8 for SMAW, 0.9 for GMAW, 1.0 for SAW).
